## Background

This section mentions python3 and .claude/skills/other-skill/foo.py as examples but is not a Verification Commands section.

## Out of Scope

- python3 direct calls are out of scope
- .claude/skills/other-skill/ is not our concern

## Verification Commands

```bash
# This is just a prose comment explaining the approach
# The following is documentation only
# AC4 - no executable commands, only comments
```

## Allowed Paths

- `.claude/skills/issue-refinement-loop/scripts/check_vc_scope.py`（新規）
- `.claude/skills/issue-refinement-loop/tests/test_vc_scope.py`（新規）
- `.claude/skills/issue-refinement-loop/tests/fixtures/`（fixture 追加のみ）
